creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
My OS FreeBSD 13.0- Release, use packages - current.
I have a problem with installing/de-installing Blender:

Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
FreeBSD repository is up to date.
All repositories are up to date.
Checking for upgrades (2 candidates): 100%
Processing candidates (2 candidates): 100%
Checking integrity... done (2 conflicting)
  - tbb-2020.3_3 conflicts with onetbb-2021.4.0 on
/usr/local/include/tbb/blocked_range.h
  - tbb-2020.3_3 conflicts with onetbb-2021.4.0 on
/usr/local/include/tbb/blocked_range.h Checking integrity... done (0
conflicting) The following 6 package(s) will be affected (of 0 checked):

Installed packages to be REMOVED:
	blender: 2.91.0_15
	embree: 3.13.2
	onetbb: 2021.4.0

New packages to be INSTALLED:
	tbb: 2020.3_3

Installed packages to be UPGRADED:
	opensubdiv: 3.4.3_4 -> 3.4.4

Installed packages to be REINSTALLED:
	pkg-1.17.5

Number of packages to be removed: 3
Number of packages to be installed: 1
Number of packages to be upgraded: 1
Number of packages to be reinstalled: 1

The operation will free 172 MiB.

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: 

Than I deleted TBD and pkg install Blender:
FreeBSD repository is up to date.
All repositories are up to date.
Checking integrity... done (0 conflicting)
The following 4 package(s) will be affected (of 0 checked):

New packages to be INSTALLED:
	blender: 2.91.0_15
	embree: 3.13.2
	onetbb: 2021.4.0
	opensubdiv: 3.4.3_4

Number of packages to be installed: 4

The process will require 302 MiB more space.

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: y

Blender works without problems.
Than I tried pkg upgrade again and the same story:

Installed packages to be REMOVED:
	blender: 2.91.0_15
	embree: 3.13.2
	onetbb: 2021.4.0

New packages to be INSTALLED:
	tbb: 2020.3_3

Installed packages to be UPGRADED:
	opensubdiv: 3.4.3_4 -> 3.4.4

Installed packages to be REINSTALLED:
	pkg-1.17.5

Number of packages to be removed: 3
Number of packages to be installed: 1
Number of packages to be upgraded: 1
Number of packages to be reinstalled: 1

The operation will free 172 MiB.

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: N

Thank you.
